summary: Iteration 244: Full E2E testing of intake question real-time pricing on product detail page. Created TEST product with all 6 question types (dropdown, multiselect, boolean, number, formula, single_line). All pricing question types verified working correctly both via backend API (23/23 tests pass) and via UI interactions. Add to Cart flow confirmed with correct final price. Identified 2 minor issues: (1) product detail page requires auth (ProtectedRoute wraps /product/:productId), (2) initial price shows $510 instead of $500 due to number question min=1 clamping when empty.

minor.issue: Product detail page is behind ProtectedRoute - unauthenticated users get redirected to /login. TEST 2 requirement of 'public product detail page as unauthenticated user' FAILS because the route is protected in App.tsx line 113.

ui_bugs.issue: Initial page load shows $510 instead of $500 base price. This is because number question 'users' with min=1, when empty string (''), the backend clamps to min=1 giving 1*$10=$10 added. The formula context treats empty as 0 so formula=0. UX inconsistency: number field shows placeholder 'Enter a number' but min=1 is applied to calc.

pricing_test_results.TEST1_pricing_api_public_access: PASS - /api/pricing/calc returns HTTP 200 without any auth token
pricing_test_results.TEST2_unauthenticated_product_page: FAIL - /product/:productId is behind ProtectedRoute, redirects to /login for unauthenticated users. Backend supports unauthenticated pricing calc but frontend route is protected.
pricing_test_results.TEST3_dropdown_realtime_pricing: PASS - Select Premium ($200) -> price updates to $710 in real-time. Line items: +$500 +$200 +$10
pricing_test_results.TEST4_multiselect_realtime_pricing: PASS - Select Reports ($50) -> price updates to $760. Multiple selections stack correctly.
pricing_test_results.TEST5_boolean_realtime_pricing: PASS - Rush Yes (+$150) -> $660. Rush No ($0) -> back to $510. Toggle works correctly.
pricing_test_results.TEST7_formula_pricing: PASS - 'Calculated fee' line item appears. users*5 formula: 5 users=$25, 10 users=$50 correctly calculated.
pricing_test_results.TEST8_visibility_rules: PASS (code verified) - ProductDetail.tsx lines 181-188 correctly filters visibleIntakeQuestions before sending to /pricing/calc. Hidden questions excluded from price calculation.
pricing_test_results.TEST9_add_to_cart: PASS - Cart receives $945.00 correctly (500+200+50+150+30+15 with premium+reports+rush+3users). Cart page shows correct total.
pricing_test_results.TEST10_all_question_types_render: PASS - All 6 question types render correctly: dropdown (Select component), multiselect (checkboxes), boolean (radio Yes/No), number (spinner input), formula (readonly 'Automatically calculated'), single_line (text input).

action_items: MEDIUM: Frontend /product/:productId is inside ProtectedRoute - if the intent is to allow unauthenticated users to view product pages, the route needs to be moved outside the ProtectedRoute wrapper in App.tsx. Currently the backend /api/store/products/{id} and /api/pricing/calc are public, but the frontend route forces login first.

LOW: Number question with min=1 causes initial price to show $510 instead of $500. Consider not clamping to min when value is empty string (treat empty as no answer, not min). Fix: in pricing_service.py, if raw is empty string, treat as None (skip calculation).
critical_code_review_comments: ProductDetail.tsx line 187: inputs passed to /pricing/calc includes BOTH nextInputs (dynamic form fields) AND visibleAnswers (intake answers). The spread order is { ...nextInputs, ...visibleAnswers } - if there's key collision, visibleAnswers wins. This is correct.

pricing_service.py: number type uses 'float(raw or min_v)' where raw is empty string -> evaluates to min_v. This means an untouched number field still contributes to price at min value. Frontend shows placeholder 'Enter a number' suggesting no value, but backend calculates at min=1.

The formula question uses ctx[k] = float(v or 0) for all inputs - so empty string -> 0 in formula context. But number type uses float(raw or min_v). This inconsistency means formula referencing a number key may get 0 when user hasn't entered anything, while the number question itself computes at min. This can cause confusing breakdowns.

success_rate.frontend: 90% (9/10 tests pass - TEST2 fails due to ProtectedRoute)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST product 'TEST Pricing Demo Product' (id: 70376638-364c-49c9-b34d-708e710c0f06) in automate-accounts tenant with all pricing question types for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test product created: id=currency-fee-fix, name='TEST Pricing Demo Product'. All intake pricing question types verified working. Main pending issue: /product/:productId route is behind ProtectedRoute - unauthenticated access impossible from frontend even though backend endpoints are public. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iter188_intake_pricing.py.
